context: A conversation stays alive when you ask back and react. A couple of easy follow-up questions and a few warm reactions do more than any long sentence - they show you're listening. Keep first-meeting questions light; age and "how long have you been here?" are normal small talk, anything more personal can wait.
explanation: Ask age with "cuantos años tienes?" and answer "tengo... años" with a number in the middle. Sprinkle in "de verdad?" (really?) to show you're interested and keep them talking.

examples.es: Cuantos años tienes? - Tengo treinta años. Y tu?
examples.en: How old are you? - I'm thirty. And you?

examples.es: Vivo aqui desde enero. - De verdad? Que bien.
examples.en: I've lived here since January. - Really? How nice.
How long have you been here?

phrases.en: How long have you been here?
